---
title: 'About Us'
date: '2012-06-17T23:08:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'TEST TCC'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '6211721902581022087'
blogger_filename: '/p/about-us.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/TEST TCC/feed.atom'
---

<h2 style="text-align: center;">      About TC&amp;C</h2><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/trade-mark-2-8c2feccce1f3.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="clear: left; float: left; margin-bottom: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="171" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/trade-mark-2-126c3459ed67.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>I am a wife of a great man and mother of two happy boys. I enjoy creating new things and learning how to work with new materials. This website is where I will post pics and updates of what I am doing. &nbsp;And every month I will post new items for sale on <a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Etsy</a>, and if you see a picture of an item not for sale in my <a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Etsy</a> store please contact me and I can see if it is still available, or make one for you.<br /><div><br /><a name='more'></a><h4 style="text-align: center;">  <br /></h4><h4 style="text-align: center;"><br /></h4><h4 style="text-align: center;">Contact Information</h4></div><div><div style="text-align: left;">email &nbsp; - &nbsp;<a href="mailto:CowsAndCrafts@gmail.com">CowsAndCrafts@gmail.com</a></div></div><div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div></div><div><div style="text-align: left;">phone - &nbsp;(817)823-7736</div></div><div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div></div><div><div style="text-align: left;">mailing - P.O. Box 1001</div></div><div><div style="text-align: left;">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;Newark, TX 76071</div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: left;">Thank you for visiting Texas Cows and Crafts!</div><div style="text-align: left;"><br /></div><div style="text-align: left;">Please contact me with any questions or special&nbsp;requests:&nbsp;<a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/p/about-us.html">Click here.</a></div><br /><b>Flavia Wolfe</b><br /><h4 style="text-align: center;">      Connect</h4><a href="http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com/">http://www.texascowsandcrafts.com</a><br /><br /><a href="http://www.etsy.com/shop/TexasCowsAndCrafts" target="_blank">Connect and Shop on &nbsp;our Etsy Store</a><br /><br /><a href="https://www.facebook.com/pages/Texas-Cows-Crafts/298135563538323" target="_blank">Connect on Facebook</a><br /><br /><a href="https://plus.google.com/b/118156879240088112738/118156879240088112738/posts" target="_blank">Connect on Google+</a><br /><br /><iframe allowtransparency="true" src="//www.facebook.com/plugins/likebox.php?href=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fpages%2FTexas-Cows-and-Crafts%2F298135563538323&amp;width=292&amp;height=62&amp;colorscheme=light&amp;show_faces=false&amp;border_color&amp;stream=false&amp;header=true" frameborder="0" scrolling="no" style="border-style: none; height: 100px; overflow: hidden; width: 250px;"></iframe><br /><a href="http://wfconceptions.wordpress.com/" target="_blank">A Wolfe Family Conceptions Company</a></div>
